case_title: TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION VS. SHAWN MOORE ET AL

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOORE, SHAWN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 216 EDDY STREET, #316, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102, SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY (CODE CIV. PROC., 715.010, 1169, AND 1174.3)***; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE OF $9.63 FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION
